description: Node dictionary for the initial Vestibular-BayesSeed default modules. It consolidates input nodes, derived nodes, derived interaction nodes, and target disease nodes across BPPV, Ménière disease, and PVP/BVP worked examples.
intended_use: Research and educational demonstration only; not a validated clinical decision-support system.
missingness_policy: Unobserved inputs are treated as missing/unobserved, not as negative evidence unless a specific negative input node is set to 1.

node_class_legend.input: Raw clinical observation supplied by user or case file.
node_class_legend.derived: Intermediate clinical construct computed via logistic CPD from parent nodes. Requires an intercept.
node_class_legend.derived_interaction: Deterministic engineered feature whose activation is the logical conjunction (AND) of parent nodes. Does not require an intercept. Used only for probabilistic ranking, not as a deterministic criteria-audit output. Downstream edge coefficients represent residual excess log-odds beyond additive main effects of the parents.

nodes.description: Red-flag positional pattern suggesting central or atypical alternative causes.
nodes.notes: Derived node is calculated from parent evidence using logistic CPD; default propagation can be thresholded or probability-based depending on engine setting.

nodes.description: Fluctuating cochleo-aural symptom cluster.
nodes.notes: Derived node is calculated from parent evidence using logistic CPD; default propagation can be thresholded or probability-based depending on engine setting.

nodes.display_name: Brief attacks lasting seconds to minutes

nodes.description: Broad BPPV-compatible triggered positional syndrome.
nodes.notes: Derived node is calculated from parent evidence using logistic CPD; default propagation can be thresholded or probability-based depending on engine setting.

nodes.display_name: Central neurologic sign or central MRI lesion
nodes.notes: Composite cross-cutting competing-evidence node; may be entered from bedside neurologic examination or imaging evidence.

nodes.description: Chronic vestibular syndrome lasting at least 3 months.
nodes.notes: Derived node is calculated from parent evidence using logistic CPD; default propagation can be thresholded or probability-based depending on engine setting.

nodes.description: Placeholder specialty-clinic prior; adjust by referral pathway.
nodes.notes: Diagnosis-node intercept is an illustrative placeholder and should be reconfigured by target clinical setting and stage before validation.

nodes.description: Supportive hydrops evidence cluster; MRI is weighted more strongly than VEMP/ECoG.

nodes.description: Recurrent spontaneous episodic vestibular syndrome with MD-compatible duration.
nodes.notes: Derived node is calculated from parent evidence using logistic CPD; default propagation can be thresholded or probability-based depending on engine setting.

nodes.description: Gait/balance burden; oscillopsia/darkness is indirect for PVP and more BVP-like.

nodes.display_name: Gait difficulty, imbalance, or recurrent falls

nodes.description: Migraine-phenotype overlap pattern; not a hard exclusion for MD.

nodes.display_name: Oscillopsia or worse in darkness/uneven ground
Vertigo/dizziness triggered by head position change

nodes.display_name: Two or more spontaneous vertigo episodes

nodes.description: Severe bilateral VOR loss compatible with BVP thresholds.
nodes.notes: Derived node is calculated from parent evidence using logistic CPD; default propagation can be thresholded or probability-based depending on engine setting.

nodes.description: Subjective positional BPPV-like pattern without objective nystagmus.

nodes.display_name: Subjective positional vertigo without observable nystagmus

nodes.description: Evidence-concordance interaction: deterministic AND of brief triggered positional syndrome and posterior-canal positional nystagmus. Residual excess log-odds beyond additive main effects. Not a diagnostic-criteria audit output; not a criteria-met node.
nodes.notes: Derived interaction node. Does not use intercept or logistic CPD. Activation is deterministic logical AND of parents. Downstream coefficient captures residual interaction effect only.

nodes.description: Evidence-concordance interaction: deterministic AND of brief triggered positional syndrome and horizontal-canal positional nystagmus. Residual excess log-odds beyond additive main effects. Not a diagnostic-criteria audit output; not a criteria-met node.
nodes.notes: Derived interaction node. Does not use intercept or logistic CPD. Activation is deterministic logical AND of parents. Downstream coefficient captures residual interaction effect only.
